items.name: Flight Paris → Edinburgh
items.notes: €142 for two. Arrive 12:05 local time.

items.text: Estimated budget ~€2700 for two: campervan rental (Sep 6–15) €980, flights €284, fuel €260, food+pubs ~€520, parking/campsites ~€360 (€40/day x 9), Edinburgh lodging €296 (2 nights).

items.name: Explore Edinburgh Old Town
items.notes: Drop bags first, then wander the Royal Mile.

items.name: Edinburgh Castle
items.notes: Last entry 17:00. Great views over the city.

items.name: Grassmarket guesthouse
items.notes: Double room, €148. Walkable to everything.

items.name: Climb Arthur's Seat
items.notes: About 2h round trip. Wear proper shoes, it gets windy.

items.name: Dean Village & Water of Leith
items.address: Dean Village, Edinburgh EH4 3BJ, United Kingdom
items.notes: Pretty riverside walk away from the crowds.

items.name: Train Edinburgh → Inverness
items.notes: £38 per person. Arrive 12:10. Book ahead for cheaper fares.

items.name: Pick up the campervan in Inverness
items.notes: Van available from 2pm. Walkthrough takes ~30 min.

items.name: Grocery run in Inverness
items.notes: Stock up before heading north — shops get sparse.

items.name: Drive to Black Isle
items.notes: Chanonry Point for sunset — dolphins often pass at the tide change.

items.name: Rogie Falls
items.notes: 45 min drive. Short loop walk, salmon leaping in season.

items.name: Drive to Ullapool
items.notes: Scenic run along Loch Glascarnoch. Lunch in the village by the harbour.

items.name: Broomfield Holiday Park
items.address: West Shore Street, Ullapool IV26 2UT, United Kingdom
items.notes: Seafront pitch, £32/night. Book ahead in summer.

items.name: Achmelvich Beach
items.notes: 1h drive. White sand and turquoise water. Brave a swim if you dare.

items.name: Stoer Head Lighthouse
items.notes: Walk out to the Old Man of Stoer sea stack, ~2h round trip.

items.name: Wild camp near Clachtoll
items.notes: Beach car park, honesty box. Arrive before dusk for a good spot.

items.name: Kylesku Bridge
items.notes: Iconic curved bridge. Stop for photos and the waterfall viewpoint.

items.name: Drive the north coast to Durness
items.notes: Single-track roads — use passing places. Allow extra time.

items.name: Smoo Cave
items.notes: Huge sea cave. Free to walk in; boat tour extra if water's calm.

items.name: Sango Sands campsite
items.notes: Clifftop pitches over the beach, £28/night.

items.name: Beach morning in Durness
items.notes: Balnakeil Beach and the craft village. Coffee at Cocoa Mountain.

items.name: Drive to Tongue
items.notes: Kyle of Tongue causeway with Ben Loyal in the background.

items.name: Wild camp by Loch Eriboll
items.notes: Quiet lay-by with loch views. Leave no trace.

items.name: Drive south to Loch Ness
items.notes: Long but beautiful drive back inland. Lunch en route.

items.name: Urquhart Castle
items.notes: £13.50 per person. Ruins right on the loch — keep an eye out for Nessie.

items.name: Loch Ness Shores campsite
items.notes: Lochside pitch, £30/night. Walk to Falls of Foyers nearby.

items.name: Drive over to Glencoe
items.notes: 2h via the A82. One of the most dramatic drives in Scotland.

items.name: Three Sisters viewpoint
items.notes: Pull-in by the road. Short walk in for the classic valley view.

items.name: Invercoe campsite
items.notes: Mountain and loch views, £29/night.

items.name: Hike the Lost Valley
items.notes: Coire Gabhail. ~3h round trip, river crossing — check conditions.

items.name: Glenfinnan Viaduct
items.notes: 1h drive. Time it for the steam train (the Jacobite) crossing if you can.

items.name: Wild camp near Loch Eil
items.notes: Lochside spot off the A830. Sunset over the water.

items.name: Drive back to Inverness
items.notes: 2h15 via Fort Augustus. Fuel up before returning the van.

items.name: Return the campervan in Inverness
items.notes: Before noon. Return with a full tank to avoid the refuel charge.

items.name: Afternoon in Inverness
items.notes: Wander the riverside and Ness Islands. Last supper in a pub.

items.name: Inverness city hostel
items.notes: Private twin, £62. Five minutes from the train station.

items.name: Flight Inverness → Paris
items.notes: Via Amsterdam. Arrive 19:30. €168 for two.
